content:
TL;DR — What People Are Actually Asking
What is Record a Skill? You screen-record yourself doing a task while narrating your reasoning, and Claude turns the demonstration into a reusable Skill.
Where do I actually find it? Inside Claude Cowork specifically — the plus menu in the desktop app’s workspace mode, not the regular chat window.
Which plans get it? Pro, Max, and Team; Free users can still run existing Skills but can’t record new ones.
Does it work in web or mobile Cowork? No — desktop app only, even though Cowork itself expanded to web and mobile on July 7, 2026.
Is everyone getting access right now? Not quite — the rollout is phased, and some Pro/Max users reported no access yet shortly after launch.
How is this different from writing a Skill by hand? Same output, a SKILL.md file, just authored from a demonstration instead of typed out yourself.
What’s the difference between a Skill and a plugin, then? A Skill is one procedure; a…
